plugins.name: claude-retrospective
plugins.description: Comprehensive analysis of Claude Code sessions to identify successful patterns, problematic areas, and opportunities for improvement.

plugins.name: claude-config-validator
plugins.description: Validates Claude Code configuration files for security, structure, and quality. Reviews CLAUDE.md, skills, agents, prompts, commands, and settings.

plugins.name: bitwarden-code-review
plugins.description: Comprehensive code review system with organization-wide standards.

plugins.name: bitwarden-init
plugins.description: Initialize Claude Code configuration with Bitwarden's standardized template format

plugins.name: bitwarden-product-analyst
plugins.description: Product analyst agent for creating comprehensive Bitwarden requirements documents from multiple sources

plugins.name: bitwarden-software-engineer
plugins.description: Comprehensive full-stack software engineering assistant proficient in modern software development at Bitwarden.

plugins.name: bitwarden-atlassian-tools
plugins.description: Read-only Atlassian access via MCP server with deep Jira issue research skill, JQL search, Confluence pages, CQL search, and attachments

plugins.name: bitwarden-security-engineer
plugins.description: Application security engineering assistant for vulnerability triage, threat modeling, and secure code analysis.

plugins.name: bitwarden-devops-engineer
plugins.description: GitHub Actions workflow compliance, action security auditing, and org-wide CI/CD remediation.

plugins.name: bitwarden-tech-lead
plugins.description: Tech lead agent for a Bitwarden product team. Architects solutions holistically with the architecture group, dispatches to delivery-lifecycle skills (initiative funnel, work transitions) when work crosses teams, and surfaces team patterns to the Technical Strategy Ideas backlog.

plugins.name: bitwarden-delivery-tools
plugins.description: Delivery lifecycle skills for Bitwarden initiatives — initiative funnel navigation, work transitions, commits, pull requests, preflight checks, and change labeling.
